generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder providing angular position of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder providing angular position after gear transmission"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor phase current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data instances
instance MotorEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw angular position data r_M from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance SecondaryEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw angular position data r_G from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor current measurement I_M"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated motor torque derived from current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity derived from motor encoder positions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular acceleration derived from angular velocity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

// C10: Models
instance SysMLRobotStructureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams describing motor, gearboxes, and flows"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionFreeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the robot axis without friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Coulomb and viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Dahl friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing LuGre friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model for deriving torque from measured current"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance VelocityCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model for deriving angular velocity from position data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used for live streaming of sensor data from the robot to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment for running simulation and data‑calculation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ControlImprovementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing integration of engineering models with the digital twin platform"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlImprovementService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard application for real‑time visualization of measured and simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of measured and simulated data in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlAccuracyInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight
]

instance ControlImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provision of updated friction models to improve robot motion control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlSetpointsAction, ScheduleMaintenanceAction
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance MotionControlAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters improve the robot controller's motion accuracy"
]

instance UpdatedFrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction parameters identified from live data are fed back to update the digital twin model"
]

instance AdjustControlSetpointsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust controller set‑points based on newly identified friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ScheduleMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Schedule maintenance activities when friction trends indicate wear"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time operation during robot motion; data is processed and visualized as it is received, enabling on‑line friction identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow consisting of a Purpose class (FrictionDerivation), an Asset class (Mabi robot), Sources (sensor channels), Processing components (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) that consume input traces and produce simulated traces, and Models (engineering, simulation, data‑calculation) linked through the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated stage – the digital shadow is created for the robot while it is in use to monitor and improve motion accuracy."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Combination of white‑box (analytical) and black‑box (data‑driven) friction models; continuous identification to capture wear, load, temperature effects; traceability of each data point to its source and processing model; validation by comparing simulated friction‑compensated output with measured reference data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the physical robot to the digital shadow via the MQTT protocol; the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) is used to encapsulate model metadata and enable standardized data access."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) as a standard for model representation and data exchange; SysML as a standard modeling language; MQTT as a standard IoT messaging protocol."
]
